news-global-econ.title: Tyler Linderbaum's $81M record-breaking deal headlines Raiders' free agent spending spree
news-global-econ.description: The Raiders made Tyler Linderbaum the highest-paid interior lineman in league history with an $81M deal, as Las Vegas goes all-in during the NFL free agency tampering period.

news-global-econ.title: Crude prices tumbles 10% as Trump signals Iran war may end soon
news-global-econ.description: WTI crude fell as much as 10% to around $85, after earlier surging near $120 on fears that escalating West Asia tensions and a blocked Strait of Hormuz could hit global supply

news-global-econ.title: Burgum: Trump's Iran Policy Will Bring 'World Peace and Economic Stability'
news-global-econ.description:
On Monday, on Fox News Channel's "The Story," Interior Secretary Doug Burgum said President Donald Trump's policy toward Iran woukd bring "lower prices and world peace and economic stability for decades to come."

news-global-econ.title: Stocks Rally and Oil Sinks After Trump's Remarks Reassure Investors That Iran War Is 'Very Complete'
news-global-econ.description:
Stocks rose and oil prices fell on Monday after President Trump indicated that the war with Iran was nearing its end.
The post Stocks Rally and Oil Sinks After Trump’s Remarks Reassure Investors That Iran War Is ‘Very Complete’ appeared first on Breitbart.

news-korea-soc.title: MICHAEL OREN: Iran has waged war on America for 47 years — time to end it
news-korea-soc.description: The casus belli for war against Iran stems from 47 years of Iranian aggression including the 1979 embassy crisis and terrorist attacks, making Operation Epic Fury legally justified.

news-global-soc.title: Trump says it’s an ‘honor’ to keep Strait of Hormuz open for China and other countries
news-global-soc.description: President says he will keep the Strait of Hormuz open for the world, including China, while announcing plans to waive oil sanctions to lower energy prices.

news-global-soc.title: Bill Banning Popular Semiautomatic Rifles, High Cap Mags, Clears Virginia Legislature
news-global-soc.description:
A bill banning AR-15s and other popular semiautomatic rifles, as well as magazines holding more than 15 rounds of ammunition, cleared the Virginia legislature Monday and is headed to Gov. Abigail Spanberger’s (D) desk.
